titles.title: Gold and silver and precious stones

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Every man on earth is given just one life Every life on earth is but a vapor It appears then its gone with a record of what's done Then we stand alone at the judgment seat of Christ Gods holy son

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We must all bow down at the judgment seat of Christ We must give account for the things we've done with our lives I will live my life for Jesus Christ So that in eternity my life will be Gold and silver and precious stones

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Every deed I've done and every thought I've known Every choice I've made tried by fire Will it burn or remain will I bow my head in shame Will I heard God say, welcome home my child well done My faithful one
